mapper.insert: INSERT INTO legal_dongs ( code, name, is_active, sido_code, sigungu_code, dong_code ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{active}, #{sidoCode}, #{sigunguCode}, #{dongCode} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), is_active = VALUES(is_active), sido_code = VALUES(sido_code), sigungu_code = VALUES(sigungu_code), dong_code = VALUES(dong_code), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
